nasb.text: To which the tribes go up, even the tribes of the Lord— An ordinance for Israel— To give thanks to the name of the Lord.

esv.text: to which the tribes go up, the tribes of the Lord, as was decreed for Israel, to give thanks to the name of the Lord.

cnv.text: 眾支派，就是耶和華的支派， 都上那裡去； 照著以色列的定例， 稱頌耶和華的名。

ccb.text: 以色列各支派，耶和华的子民， 都遵照祂赐的法度去那里称谢祂。

csbs.text: 众支派，就是耶和华的众支派，都上那里去—— 这是照着以色列的法度，为要称颂耶和华的名；
